name: Pepper Jelly
recipeIngredient: Red or green food coloring (as desired)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put sweet red or green peppers through a food grinder using the coarse blade. Reserve the juice and drain the pulp well.
2. Strain the juice through a cheesecloth, repeating with the hot red peppers.
3. In a large saucepan, mix 1-1/2 cups of sweet pepper juice and 1/4 cup of hot pepper juice.
4. Add sugar, vinegar, and water to the mixture. Bring to a boil.
5. Stir in the liquid fruit pectin and continue boiling vigorously for one minute.
6. Remove from heat and let stand for five minutes.
7. Add a few drops of red or green food coloring, if desired.
8. Skim any foam that forms.
9. Pour into hot, sterilized jelly jars or glasses and seal. Makes 8 half-pint jars.
